values.title: Pristine Home Cleaning
values.hero_title: A Cleaner Home, A Happier Life
values.hero_subtitle: Professional Cleaning Services You Can Count On
values.hero_description: Pristine Home Cleaning delivers thorough, reliable cleaning services tailored to your schedule and preferences. Our bonded and insured teams use eco-friendly products and proven methods to make your home sparkle.
values.cta_description: Tell us about your home and we'll provide a customized quote within the hour. No hidden fees, no contracts, and 100% satisfaction guaranteed on every clean.

values.title: Standard Cleaning
values.body:
Our standard cleaning service covers everything you need to maintain a clean, comfortable home. Our trained teams follow a detailed checklist to ensure consistent results every visit.

Room-by-Room Coverage

We clean all rooms including bedrooms, living areas, kitchens, and bathrooms. Each visit includes dusting all surfaces, vacuuming and mopping floors, cleaning and sanitizing bathrooms, and tidying the kitchen.

Your Satisfaction Guaranteed

If you're not happy with any aspect of our cleaning, we'll return within 24 hours to make it right at no additional charge.
values.summary: Comprehensive home cleaning covering all rooms with a detailed checklist.

values.title: Deep Cleaning
values.body:
Our deep cleaning service goes beyond the surface to tackle built-up grime, forgotten corners, and areas that don't get attention during regular cleaning. Perfect for a first-time cleaning, seasonal refresh, or before hosting guests.

What Makes It Deep

We clean inside appliances, behind furniture, scrub grout, clean baseboards, wipe down cabinet fronts, and detail areas that accumulate dust and buildup over time. This service typically takes twice as long as a standard cleaning.
values.summary: Intensive top-to-bottom cleaning for a fresh start or seasonal refresh.

values.title: Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning
values.body:
Starting fresh in a new home or leaving your old one spotless for the next owners? Our move-in/move-out cleaning service ensures every surface is pristine. We clean empty homes from top to bottom, including areas that are impossible to reach when furnished.

Ideal For

  • Renters moving out and wanting their security deposit back
  • New homeowners wanting a fresh start
  • Landlords preparing a property for new tenants
  • Real estate agents staging homes for sale
values.summary: Complete cleaning of empty or soon-to-be-empty homes for seamless transitions.
includes: Light switch and outlet plate cleaning

image.alt: Sparkling clean empty room ready for move-in
image.title: Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning

values.title: Basic Plan
values.body: Our most affordable recurring cleaning plan, perfect for maintaining a tidy home between deeper cleans. Ideal for smaller homes and apartments where a lighter touch is all you need.

image.alt: Clean and tidy apartment living space
image.title: Basic Cleaning Plan

values.title: Premium Plan
values.body: Our most popular plan balances thoroughness with value. You get everything in the basic plan plus additional attention to detail that keeps your home consistently spotless. Includes priority scheduling and our satisfaction guarantee.

values.title: Luxury Plan
values.body: The ultimate cleaning experience for larger homes and discerning clients. Our Luxury Plan includes everything in the Premium tier plus specialized services that keep every corner of your home in pristine condition. Dedicated team assigned to your home for complete consistency.

image.alt: Luxurious home interior with immaculate finishes
image.title: Luxury Cleaning Plan

values.title: Finally Found Our Cleaning Team
values.body: We've tried three different cleaning services over the years, and Pristine is the first one we've stuck with. They're consistent, thorough, and genuinely trustworthy. Coming home to a clean house every other Tuesday is the highlight of my week. The same team comes every time, which makes such a difference.

values.title: Move-Out Cleaning Saved Our Deposit
values.body: We were moving out of our rental after four years and were worried about the condition. Pristine did a move-out cleaning that was beyond thorough. Our landlord said it was the cleanest the apartment had been since it was built. Got our full deposit back thanks to them!

values.title: Perfect for Our Busy Family
values.body: With three kids and two dogs, our house is a constant mess. Pristine's weekly service keeps us sane. They use eco-friendly products which is important to us with young children crawling around. The online booking and communication is super easy too. Wouldn't change a thing.

values.title: About Pristine Home Cleaning
values.body:
Pristine Home Cleaning was founded in 2011 by Maria Vasquez, a single mom who saw an opportunity to build a cleaning business that treated both clients and employees with respect. Today, our team of 45+ cleaning professionals serves hundreds of homes across the greater Austin area.

Our Difference

Every Pristine cleaner goes through a rigorous background check, 40 hours of hands-on training, and ongoing quality evaluations. We use exclusively eco-friendly, non-toxic cleaning products that are safe for children, pets, and the environment.

Community Commitment

We donate cleaning services to families in need through our partnership with local shelters and social services organizations. Because everyone deserves to come home to a clean space.

values.title: Contact Us
values.body:
Ready for a cleaner home? Request a quote online or give us a call. We respond to all inquiries within one hour during business hours.

Office Hours

Monday - Friday: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM
Sunday: Closed

Service Area

We serve Austin, Round Rock, Cedar Park, Georgetown, Pflugerville, and surrounding communities within a 30-mile radius of downtown Austin.

Get in Touch

Phone: (512) 555-0294
Email: hello@pristinehomecleaning.com
